claim_text: We contend that clinical translation is presently impeded not so much by a lack of agents, but by the difficulty in measuring tumor metabolism in vivo5,13 , namely total glucose consumption and the relative fraction of glucose undergoing GLY versus OXPHOS. 1.2 Alternative measures of glucose metabolism Oftheglucosemetabolicimagingtechniques,PETisthemost widely available metabolic imaging tool, and 18 F-FDG-PET (FDG-PET) has found widespread use in cancer imaging due tothehighglucoseneedsofmanycancers.However,itsusein studyingbraintumorsissomewhatlimitedbyhighgraymatter FDG uptake14 .
